feature_note: venue_elevation replaced by binary indicator: 1 if stadium altitude > 300m, 0 otherwise. Threshold 300m captures mild high-altitude venues (Mexico City, Guadalajara, also Kansas City ~314m) that are excluded by 500m threshold.
model: KDE_TS(bw=300, C2=2.0, pw=0.2) * 0.24 + SVC(C=6.0, kernel='rbf', gamma='scale') * 0.76
key_finding: Threshold 300m dramatically better than 500m (0.7175 vs 0.7388). This is the first config to beat the Wave-2 frontier with statistical significance (p=0.0123 < 0.05). Accuracy also improves from 67% to 72%.
